mapper.select:
SELECT
mr.room_no,
my.id AS user_id, my.nickname AS user_nickname, my.profile AS user_profile,
target.id AS target_id, target.nickname AS target_nickname, target.profile AS target_profile,
NVL(msg.last_msg, '대화 내용이 없습니다.') AS last_msg, NVL(msg.unread_cnt, 0) AS unread_cnt,
'ACCEPTED' AS status
FROM messenger_room mr
JOIN messenger_member mm1 ON mr.room_no = mm1.room_no
JOIN member my ON mm1.user_id = my.id
JOIN messenger_member mm2 ON mr.room_no = mm2.room_no
JOIN member target ON mm2.user_id = target.id
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT
room_no,
MAX( DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(content, 100, 1) ) KEEP( DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY msg_no ) AS last_msg,
COUNT( CASE WHEN is_read = 'N' AND sender_id != #{user_id} THEN 1 END ) AS unread_cnt
FROM messenger_data
GROUP BY room_no
) msg ON mr.room_no = msg.room_no
WHERE mm1.user_id = #{user_id} AND mm2.user_id != #{user_id}
ORDER BY mr.room_no DESC

SELECT
msg_no, room_no, sender_id, content, file_name, is_read,
TO_CHAR( mdate, 'AM HH:MI' ) AS updated_at
FROM messenger_data
WHERE room_no = #{room_no}
ORDER BY msg_no ASC

SELECT
f.status,
me.id AS user_id, me.nickname AS user_nickname, me.profile AS user_profile,
target.id AS target_id, target.nickname AS target_nickname, target.profile AS target_profile,
0 AS room_no, '' AS last_msg, 0 AS unread_cnt
FROM friend f
JOIN member me ON f.user_id = me.id
JOIN member target ON f.target_id = target.id
WHERE (f.user_id = #{user_id} OR f.target_id = #{user_id})
AND f.status = 'PENDING'
